name: whaviso-dev
description: Lançador de desenvolvimento — sobe backend (api) + frontend juntos. backend/ e frontend/ continuam projetos independentes.

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n api,web -c green,cyan "npm --prefix backend run dev:api" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -k -n api,zap,web -c green,yellow,cyan "npm --prefix backend run dev:api" "npm --prefix backend run dev:zap" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"
scripts.install:all: npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install
scripts.lint: npm --prefix backend run lint && npm --prefix frontend run lint
scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix backend run typecheck && npm --prefix frontend run typecheck
scripts.test: npm --prefix backend test && npm --prefix frontend test
